events.name: Carnival of Cocktails
events.description: Main event of Seattle Cocktail Week. Bigger than ever, taking over four floors of Pacific Place with various vendors and tastings.

events.name: Ben Schwartz & Friends
events.description: Comedy improv show featuring Ben Schwartz and friends at the historic Paramount Theatre.

events.name: Seattle Symphony - Xian Conducts Daniil Trifonov
events.description: The Seattle Symphony performs with conductor Xian and pianist Daniil Trifonov.

events.name: West Seattle Tool Library Annual Tool Sale
events.description: Annual tool sale featuring quality used tools at bargain prices. Support this community resource.

events.name: Emerald City Ride
events.description: Cascade Bicycle Club's signature ride closes parts of southbound Highway 99 and the West Seattle Bridge to motor vehicles for a few hours.
